splunk.description: A direct system-level service for executing SPL queries and retrieving Splunk schema. This is a system-orchestrated tool: invoke it directly using the tool-calling interface. Do not attempt to import this as a Python library or write code to interact with it; simply pass the required arguments to the system runner.

jira.description: A system-level capability for issue management in Jira. Use this tool directly via the system execution protocol for searching and creating tickets. Do not attempt to import this as a Python library or write code to interact with it; simply pass the required arguments to the system runner.
